zh.Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Al: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o普利卡爾德
zh.Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d': 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉
zh.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange於1202年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o普利卡爾德時，他的父親Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I28歲，母親Ermengarde De Sabran32歲。他於1239年6月17日與Malberjone Artaud d'Aix在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1281年4月10日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉享年79歲。

zh-hans.Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Al: 法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o普利卡爾德

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange于1202年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o普利卡爾德时，他的父亲Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I28岁，母亲Ermengarde De Sabran32岁。他于1239年6月17日与Malberjone Artaud d'Aix在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1281年4月10日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange was born in 1202, in Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I, was 28 and his mother, Ermengarde De Sabran, was 32. He married Malberjone Artaud d'Aix on 17 June 1239, in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 10 April 1281, in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange est né en 1202, à Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde De Sabran, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Malberjone Artaud d'Aix le 17 juin 1239, à Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1281, à Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange 1202 in Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I 28 und seine Mutter Ermengarde De Sabran 32. Er hat am 17. Juni 1239 in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Malberjone Artaud d'Aix geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 10. April 1281 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Malberjone Artaud d'Aix il 17 giugno 1239, nel Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Al: フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンプウイリカード
ja.Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d': フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼオランッジ
ja.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンレス バウクス-デ-プローベンス
ja.lifeSummary: Raymond Ier des Baux-Orangeが1202年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンプウイリカードで生まれた時，父Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux Iは28歳，母Ermengarde De Sabranは32歳であった。1239年6月17日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼオランッジでMalberjone Artaud d'Aixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1281年4月10日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼオランッジで79歳で死去した。

ko.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 레스 바스-데-프로븐스
ko.lifeSummary: Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange(이)가 1202년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 푸이리카드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde De Sabran(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1239년 6월 17일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 오랑에서 Malberjone Artaud d'Aix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1281년 4월 10일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 오랑에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange nasceu em 1202, em Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde De Sabran, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Malberjone Artaud d'Aix em 17 de junho de 1239, em Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1281, em Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 79 anos.

ro.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Franţa

ru.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: лесь баукс-де-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange родился в 1202 г. в местности пуирикард, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde De Sabran, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Malberjone Artaud d'Aix 17 июня 1239 г. в местности оранг, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 10 апреля 1281 г. в местности оранг, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange nació en 1202, en Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ermengarde De Sabran, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Malberjone Artaud d'Aix el 17 de junio de 1239, en Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 10 de abril de 1281, en Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 79 años.
